question: The Election Commission manages the voting process.
You can vote if you are 15 years old.
The ink on the finger stays for many days.
You must tell the police who you voted for.
The results are usually announced a few days after voting.
One person has only one vote.
You can bring a dog inside the voting booth.
A candidate can be a man or a woman.
Voters can choose 'None of the Above' (NOTA).
The army decides who wins the election.
